migrations.title: OpenHands Runtime Profiles
migrations.description: Migrate from single runtime defaults to explicit runtime profiles for local/cloud execution.

steps.title: Define named runtimes
steps.description: Replace implicit default runtime with named profiles.
steps.after:
runtimes:
  local:
    type: docker
    workspace: /workspace
  cloud:
    type: remote
    region: us-east-1
steps.notes: Use profile selection per task to avoid accidental environment mismatch.

steps.title: Per-task runtime selection
steps.description: Specify runtime profile when launching tasks.
steps.notes: Improves reproducibility between CI and local runs.
